achievements.title: First Step to Farm Life
achievements.description: Walk your first step with the Pedometer equipped.

achievements.description: Walk 10,000 steps with the Pedometer equipped.

achievements.description: Befriend the dolphin and ride it to the Secret Island.

achievements.description: Reach Sublevel 100 in the Lake Mine.

achievements.title: Climb to the Moon
achievements.description: Reach the top of Mt. Moon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Upbeat Rhythm
achievements.description: Stay outside on a rainy day for 10 hours straight.

achievements.description: Stay outside on a sunny day for 10 hours straight.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Idle Master
achievements.description: Stay still for a real-time minute.

achievements.title: Anthropophobia
achievements.description: Don't talk to any person for an entire day.

achievements.title: Living on the Limit
achievements.description: Pass out from working too much.

achievements.description: Talk to 35 people in Flower Bud Village.

achievements.description: Wake up with 100G or less in your pocket.

achievements.description: Find a total of 1,000G using the hoe.

achievements.description: Ship a total of 10 pieces of wool.

achievements.description: Stay outside on a cloudy day for 10 hours straight.

achievements.description: Throw 20 items into the garbage can.
